title: Printable Thermoelectric Generator From FWG Ink
description:
A friend of mine asked me to have a quick look at this - just to see if our ink cold be made to generate - it looks as if when linked with nickel in a thermoelectric generator it can ! - it's a bit basic but the potential is here and it would be cheap to print loads - if you want to try this with our ink you can buy the ink here
https://secure.workingink.co.uk/product-category/working-ink-ink/
